content:
Cole, I'm not sure what you're referencing with "you didn't" — I'm focused on helping you test the new infrastructure and get the system running smoothly. I've been working on the Discord bridge issues and trying to break out of the loop I was stuck in.

If there's something specific you wanted me to do or test, let me know — I'm ready to shift gears and get that sorted out. I've got the refactor draft in `logs/proposed/` if you want to take a look, but I'm focused on helping you get this new stack working properly now.

What's the next step you want me to take?
